fields.name: Green View Cottages and spa
fields.tagline: Hotel Green View Cottages and Spa | Budget Resort in Mount Abu
fields.short_description: Welcome to Hotel Green View Cottages, a perfect tranquil retreat located at the scenic entry point of Mount Abu. Nestled amid dense, lush gardens and vibrant vegetation, our property offers nature lovers a peaceful environment to unwind. Experience a cozy stay that perfectly balances budget-friendly tariffs with the beauty of Rajasthan's only hill station.
fields.description:
Garden View AC Cottage: Private cottage layouts featuring direct views of the dense lawn.
Family Room: Spacious, soundproofed rooms structured to accommodate parents and kids comfortably.
Deluxe Room: Standard comfortable double rooms equipped with essential conveniences.
facilities: Free Wi-Fi,On-site Restaurant,Private Spa Treatment Rooms,Open-air Bonfire Area,Lush Green Lawn and Garden,Secure Guest Parking Space,24-Hour Front Desk,Daily Room Housekeeping,Room Service,Airport and Railway Shuttle Service,Travel Desk and Car Rentals,Hot and Cold Water Supply,Attached Private Bathrooms,Modern Flat-screen TVs,In-room Heating and Fireplace,In-room Air Conditioning,Laundry and Dry Cleaning Service

house_rules: Guests must present a valid government-issued photo ID upon check-in.Standard check-in time starts from 12:00 PM onwards.
Standard check-out time must be completed by 10:00 AM.Loud music and noisy activities are strictly prohibited after 10:00 PM.
Cooking inside the guest cottage rooms is strictly prohibited.
Smoking is prohibited inside the rooms but permitted in designated outdoor garden areas.
Unregistered visitors are not allowed to stay overnight in guest rooms.
fields.cancellation_policy:
Free cancellation is available if booking is cancelled up to 48 hours before check-in.
Cancellations made within 48 hours of arrival will incur a 100% charge for the first night.
Non-refundable bookings cannot be cancelled or modified free of charge.
No-shows will be charged the full amount of the total booking cost.
fields.refund_policy:
Eligible refunds will be processed back to the original payment method within 7 to 10 working days.
No refunds will be issued for early departures or shortened stays after checking in.
Processing fees or platform convenience charges are completely non-refundable.
fields.child_policy:
Children aged 5 years and under stay free when using existing bedding.
Children aged 6 to 11 years will be charged a child supplement rate per night.
Children aged 12 years and above are treated as adults and require an extra bed setup.
fields.pet_policy:
This property is proudly pet-friendly and welcomes dogs and cats.
Prior notification to management is mandatory before bringing pets to the property.
Pets must be kept on a leash whenever they are in common garden or lawn areas.
Owners are entirely responsible for cleaning up after their pets on the premises.
fields.extra_guest_policy:
The maximum capacity of extra guests varies depending on the chosen cottage layout.
Extra adult guests will be accommodated with an additional rollaway bed or mattress.
Mandatory extra guest charges apply per night and include complimentary breakfast.
fields.damage_policy:
Guests are held legally and financially liable for any damage caused to property structural assets.
Any breakage or staining of resort linens, furniture, or decor items will be charged directly to the guest bill.
Management reserves the right to deduct repair or deep-cleaning fees from any security deposit held.
fields.early_check_in_policy:
Early check-in requests before 12:00 PM are strictly subject to room availability upon arrival.
To guarantee an early check-in before 8:00 AM, guests must book the room from the previous night.
Nominal nominal hourly surcharges may apply for checking in early.
fields.late_check_out_policy:
Late check-outs past 10:00 AM must receive prior approval from the front desk team.
Extensions up to 2:00 PM may be granted complimentary subject to succeeding booking schedules.
Check-outs extended past 2:00 PM will automatically incur a half-day or full-day room charge.
fields.billing_address: Chaudhary Gali, Badi Dhundai, Mount Abu, Sirohi, Rajasthan
fields.seo_title: Hotel Green View Cottages and Spa | Budget Resort in Mount Abu
fields.seo_description: Escape to Hotel Green View Cottages and Spa in Mount Abu, Rajasthan. Enjoy serene garden view cottages, family rooms, pure veg dining, and relaxing spa therapies. Book your peaceful nature getaway today!
seo_keywords: Green View Cottages Mount Abu, budget resorts in Mount Abu, cottage stay Rajasthan, family hotel Mount Abu, Mount Abu hotels near Nakki Lake, spa resorts Mount Abu.
fields.admin_notes:
Verify that the updated property name matches the official registration docs including the word "Spa".
Audit external travel platforms regularly to sync available room inventory and avoid double bookings.
Confirm that the dynamic Google Maps API key is fully integrated on the contact page using coordinates 24.59543, 72.71539.
Update room tariff grids seasonally to align with peak tourism windows in Mount Abu.Cross-check that the automated confirmation email templates include the newly added pet guidelines.
Review incoming guest feedback monthly to update the on-site FAQ section.
Ensure all active discount vouchers are locked to prevent stacking codes during long weekends.
